ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the ticket is for */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member who purchased the ticket */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., sold, refunded) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for purchasing the ticket */,
  "purchase_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who purchased the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club organizing the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., sports match, community gathering) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "maximum_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees the event can accommodate */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Base price of the ticket for the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the club is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club president */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the club */,
  "club_type" TEXT /* Type of the club (e.g., sports, community, charity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the member resides */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the member belongs to */,
  "member_status" TEXT /* Status of the member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the club */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., annual, lifetime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member who made the contribution */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of the contribution (e.g., donation, sponsorship) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the contribution is related to (if applicable) */,
  "contribution_receipt" TEXT /* Receipt number or reference for the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, club manager, member) */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view event, purchase ticket) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the user accessed (if applicable) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
